{{CargoRelic
|name=Bunny Chef
|class_id=20652
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Mad Hatter's culinary cousin - a white-gloved bunny chef in carrot-print apron, forever late for your dinner reservation!
|fame=14
|art=30
|fth=19
|civ=10
|tech=18
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail HP +40<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail HP +80<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail HP +120<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail HP +120<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail HP +120<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
